name: Burpees
lead: Exercise for chest, triceps, deltoids, abs, glutes, quadriceps, hamstrings and calves

instructions.starting position: Start in a squat position with your hands on the ground and your head in line with the body.
instructions.execution: While holding onto your hands, move both legs backwards into a face-up position and perform a push-up. Without stopping, bring your legs back to the initial squatting position, then perform a vertical jump by raising your hands towards the sky.
